text: Add regression coverage for watchdog panel supervisor header semantics
description: Add focused tests that verify the watchdog panel renders lease placement, supervisor naming, automate/stop wording, state text/color, and absence of obsolete owner/worker header UI. Cover both hydrated runtime state and live socket-driven state updates where practical.

reflections.context: Add regression coverage for WatchdogPanel supervisor header semantics, especially state color styling and live/reactive state updates, while keeping implementation changes minimal unless tests revealed a gap.
reflections.outcome: Extended WatchdogPanel.spec.ts with tests for hydrated supervisor state color and reactive updates from EXPLORING to WRAPPING_UP, including both displayed text and color style. No production code changes were needed because the existing component already satisfied the behavior.
reflections.effectiveness: The test-only change filled the missing coverage without churn. Focused WatchdogPanel tests, frontend type-check, and the full frontend unit suite all pass.
reflections.lesson: When an aim is coverage-focused, first inspect existing behavior and add tests around the stated gaps; avoid changing implementation unless the new tests fail for a real behavior issue.
reflections.pattern: Regression aims often complete cleanly by codifying behavior that already exists, especially after nearby implementation work has already landed.

status.comment: Added focused WatchdogPanel regression coverage for supervisor state color styling and reactive live state text/color updates. Existing tests already covered lease placement, supervisor naming, automate wording, and obsolete owner/worker/animator label absence. Verified with focused WatchdogPanel spec, frontend type-check, and full frontend unit suite.
